name: hk-electricity-calculator
description: Hong Kong Appliance Electricity Bill Calculator

scripts.build: cp index.html www/index.html && mkdir -p www/data www/js/domain && cp data/clp-tariff.json data/hke-tariff.json www/data/ && sed 's/^export //' src/domain/appliance-search.js > www/js/domain/appliance-search.js && cp node_modules/@capacitor/core/dist/capacitor.js www/capacitor.js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run ios
